$description: sachcuahuy.com design tokens — W3C Design Tokens community format (draft, 2024-05). Generated from tailwind.config.ts + src/app/globals.css on 2026-05-11. Source of truth: code. Do not hand-edit; regenerate from source.

DEFAULT.$description: Navy — main brand color. Buttons, headings, focus rings.

dark.$description: Deepest navy — rarely used; reserved for emphasis.

DEFAULT.$description: Terracotta — Phase 1 magical overhaul. AA Large on cream (~4.5:1). Headings, badges, decoratives.

dark.$description: Terracotta-dark. AA Normal on cream (~6.5:1). Inline body links, accents, scrollbar thumb.

DEFAULT.$description: Cobalt blue — watercolor wash + sunset gradient mid-stop.

ink.$description: Deeper navy for type on cream where contrast matters.

paper.$description: Warm paper tone — scrollbar track, paper-texture base.

serif.$description: Cormorant Garamond. next/font subsets: latin, vietnamese. Weights 400, 700. Headings (h1-h6) + display.

sans.$description: Inter. next/font subsets: latin, vietnamese. Body + UI.

script.$description: Dancing Script. next/font subsets: latin, vietnamese. Weight 400. Signature flourish, decorative.

book.$description: Hero book cover shadow. Asymmetric (positive x/y) to suggest a physical object on a surface.

radius.$description: Tailwind defaults — see https://tailwindcss.com/docs/border-radius. Site uses three from default scale; no overrides.

reducedMotion.$value: respects prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — animation-duration 0.01ms, iteration-count 1, transition-duration 0.01ms
reducedMotion.$description: Global override in globals.css media query.

spacing.$description: Tailwind default scale used unmodified — see https://tailwindcss.com/docs/customizing-spacing. Custom sections use semantic classes only.

section.$description: .section semantic class: 2rem / 4rem / 6rem vertical padding by breakpoint.

watercolor-wash-cobalt.$description: Soft cobalt blob backdrop. References color.cobalt.DEFAULT.

watercolor-wash-terracotta.$description: Soft terracotta blob backdrop. References color.accent.DEFAULT.

watercolor-wash-sunset.$description: Hero sunset gradient: navy → cobalt → terracotta. References primary + cobalt + accent.

paper-texture.$value: SVG fractalNoise filter, base 240×240, rgba(0.55,0.45,0.30,0.6) tint
paper-texture.$description: Inline SVG data-URI (no HTTP). See globals.css .paper-texture utility.

decorative-line.$value: SVG hand-drawn wave, stroke #C75D2C width 2, repeat-x, 200×20
